name: Zorvathi
description: The Zorvathi are a multi-legged insectoid hive species that spent most of their evolutionary history building vast underground tunnel networks, eventually hollowing out the entire lithosphere of their homeworld into a planet-spanning colony. Their mastery of boring, bracing, and pressurized construction made orbital engineering feel intuitive — a space station is simply a tunnel with no planet around it. The Zorvathi hive-mind coordinates millions of workers without friction or debate, making their infrastructure projects terrifyingly efficient.
